reference: My son fainted last Saturday, and before that, he was in bed feeling very tired. He told me he needed chocolate, so I gave it to him, and all of a sudden, his energy level went up. I took him to the doctor; they ran a blood test, and his blood sugar level was at thirty-five. What could be wrong with him?
text: My son fainted last Saturday, and before that, he was in bed feeling very tired. He told me he needed chocolate, so I gave it to him, and all of a sudden, his energy level went up. I took him to the doctor, they ran a blood test, and his blood sugar level was at 35. What could be wrong with him?
